name: Cabin Flights
description: AI-first travel booking with natural language queries. Search and book real flights with crypto micropayments (x402).

X402_PRIVATE_KEY.description: EVM wallet private key for x402 micropayments (0x-prefixed hex string)

X402_NETWORK.description: Blockchain network for payments (base, ethereum, polygon)

tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search for flights between airports with flexible parameters. Costs $0.01 USDC per search via x402 micropayments.

tools.name: get_flight_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific flight from search results.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check x402 payment wallet balance and system health status.

tools.name: get_booking_status
tools.description: Check the status of a flight booking using booking reference number.
